problem_statement: Change requests are taking too long to move from intake to decision, causing repeated stakeholder escalation and missed downstream planning dates.
current_symptoms: Cycle time varies widely from request to request
Teams repeatedly ask for status because ownership is unclear
Rework occurs when requests reach review without the right information
constraints: No additional headcount is available this quarter
Supplier and internal approval timelines must both be respected
stakeholder_concerns: Program managers need predictable decision timing
Engineering wants cleaner intake quality before review
Leadership wants fewer escalations and clearer accountability
